testcase.name: testSubmitJobIntegration
testcase.system-out:
13:24:59.568 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.taskengine.coordinator.integration.JobSubmissionIntegrationTest]: JobSubmissionIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:24:59.805 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.taskengine.coordinator.CoordinatorApplication for test class com.taskengine.coordinator.integration.JobSubmissionIntegrationTest 13:25:00.027 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.images.PullPolicy -- Image pull policy will be performed by: DefaultPullPolicy() 13:25:00.032 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.ImageNameSubstitutor -- Image name substitution will be performed by: DefaultImageNameSubstitutor (composite of 'ConfigurationFileImageNameSubstitutor' and 'PrefixingImageNameSubstitutor') 13:25:00.105 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Testcontainers version: 1.21.4 13:25:00.873 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.dockerclient.DockerClientProviderStrategy -- Found Docker environment with local Npipe socket (npipe:////./pipe/docker_engine) 13:25:00.893 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Docker host IP address is localhost 13:25:00.926 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Connected to docker: Server Version: 29.5.3 API Version: 1.54 Operating System: Docker Desktop Total Memory: 7743 MB Labels: com.docker.desktop.address=npipe://\\.\pipe\docker_cli 13:25:01.123 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 -- Pulling docker image: testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0. testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Ashish Chaurasiya\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
